leadText: A Pamtre Berry (Japanese: シーヤのみ Shīya Fruit) is a type of Berry introduced in Generation III.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Ingredient 1.2 Exchange 1.2.1 Generation IV 1.2.2 Pokémon Dream World Effect [ edit | edit source ] Pamtre Berries cannot be used directly and only have a use as an ingredient, such as for Pokéblocks and Poffins . Ingredient [ edit | edit source ] Berry Blending R S E When blending with NPCs, Pamtre Berries will produce the following Pokéblocks : NPC NPCs' Berries Flavors ( 100 RPM ) Feel 1 NPC Dryness 51, Sweetness 12 45 2 NPCs Dryness 51, Bitterness 12 37 3 NPCs Dryness 51, Sourness 12 32 Blend Master Dryness 51, Sweetness 25 48 OR AS Pamtre Berries are blue Berries that have a low chance of producing a Pokéblock +. Berry Crush FR LG E Pamtre Berries have a base Berry Powder of 250 and a difficulty of 160. With two players, this Berry will contribute 500 units of Berry Powder at 100% silkiness. Poffin Cooking D P Pt BD SP When used alone, Pamtre Berries will produce Poffins with Dryness 19, Sweetness 9 and smoothness 34 when cooked in 1 minute with no spills or burns. Ice Cream Scoop DW Flavor 1 Flavor 2 Flavor 3 Easy to scoop Stickiness Juice Shoppe X Y Pamtre Berries are purple Berries in Group 1. Composting X Y Pamtre Berries are purple Berries. Exchange [ edit | edit source ] Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Diamond, Pearl , and Platinum , the player can exchange Pamtre Berries for accessories at the Pick a Peck of Colors Flower Shop . In Pokémon Diamond and Pearl, the player can exchange: 50 Pamtre Berries for an Old Umbrella 120 Pamtre Berries for a Retro Pipe In Pokémon Platinum, the player can exchange: 100 Pamtre Berries for a Cape Pokémon Dream World [ edit | edit source ] In the Pokémon Dream World , the player could exchange Berries for Décor . The following Décor required Pamtre Berries. Catalogue Décor Price Plain Catalogue Ultra Ball Rug 35 Pamtre Berries 35 Rabuta Berries 35 Nomel Berries Plain Catalogue Stepped Bookcase 15 Pamtre Berries 20 Nomel Berries Plain Catalogue Castle Keep 350 Pamtre Berries 350 Spelon Berries 350 Rabuta Berries Pokémon Doll Catalogue Smoochum Doll 50 Pamtre Berries Pokémon Doll Catalogue Cacnea Doll 50 Pamtre Berries Pokémon Doll Catalogue Drilbur Doll 50 Pamtre Berries Pokémon Doll Catalogue Vanillite Doll 50 Pamtre Berries

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Pamtre Berries raise Snorlax's Strength, doubling the effect if the Berry is Snorlax's favorite. The base amount of Strength raised by the Berry is determined by the level of the helper Pokémon that gathered it.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods R S E Route 123 ( Berry Master's wife ) Mossdeep Game Corner ( Dodrio Berry Picking with 5 players) E FR LG Pickup (any level ) Joyful Game Corner ( Dodrio Berry Picking with 5 players) Colo XD Trade D P Pt Amity Square (found by walking Pokémon , given by a man Pt ) Spin Trade (5 players) Pt HG SS Spin Trade (5 players) PW White Lake , Beyond the Sea B W B2 W2 Transfer from Dream World DW * Dream Park X Y Trade OR AS Route 123 ( Berry Masters's wife ) Hyper Rank Pokémon Contest Spectacular (given by fan) BD SP Amity Square (found by walking Pokémon ) Distribution [ edit | edit source ] As a held item [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period D P Pt Shinsegae Department Store Feebas Korean July 4 to 5, 2009

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Pamtre Berries can be gathered by Flying-type helper Pokémon in the player's team. Like all Berries in the game, gathered Pamtre Berries do not go into the player's inventory and instead are immediately eaten by Snorlax.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E P O K é block ingredient. Plant in loamy soil to grow Pamtre . FR LG Can be ground up into a powder as an ingredient for medicine. Colo XD An item brought over from a faraway place. D P Pt A Poffin ingredient. Bury it in soft soil to grow a Pamtre Plant. HG SS In the Sinnoh region, they like to make sweets known as Poffins with this Berry and feed them to their Pokémon. B W B2 W2 A Berry which is very rare in the Unova region. A maniac will buy it for a high price. X Y A Berry to be used in cooking. This Berry is very rare and hard to obtain in the Unova region. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh LA Used to make Pokéblocks that will enhance your Beauty, this Berry is rare in other regions. BD SP A Poffin ingredient. Bury it in soft soil to grow a Pamtre Berry Plant. S V Used to make Pokéblocks that will enhance Beauty. This Berry is rare in other regions. Tag information [ edit | edit source ] No. 32 Size: 9.6" (24.4 cm) Firmness: Very soft Games Description R S E Drifts on the sea from somewhere. It is thought to grow elsewhere. D P Pt BD SP This Berry drifted from a faraway sea. It is now cultivated in the Sinnoh region.

Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods R S E Route 123 ( Berry Master's wife ) Mossdeep Game Corner ( Dodrio Berry Picking with 5 players) E FR LG Pickup (any level ) Joyful Game Corner ( Dodrio Berry Picking with 5 players) Colo XD Trade D P Pt Amity Square (found by walking Pokémon , given by a man Pt ) Spin Trade (5 players) Pt HG SS Spin Trade (5 players) PW White Lake , Beyond the Sea B W B2 W2 Transfer from Dream World DW * Dream Park X Y Trade OR AS Route 123 ( Berry Masters's wife ) Hyper Rank Pokémon Contest Spectacular (given by fan) BD SP Amity Square (found by walking Pokémon ) Distribution [ edit | edit source ] As a held item [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period D P Pt Shinsegae Department Store Feebas Korean July 4 to 5, 2009 Growth [ edit | edit source ] Generation III Planted 0 hours Sprouted 18 hours Taller 36 hours Flowering 54 hours Berries 72 hours A Pamtre plant will yield 1-2 Berries. Generation IV Planted 0 hours Sprouted 15 hours Taller 30 hours Flowering 45 hours Berries 60 hours A Pamtre plant will yield 3-15 Berries. A growing Pamtre plant's soil dries by 8% every hour, fully drying out in 13 hours. Generation V Planted 0 hours Sprouted 22.5 hours Taller 45 hours Flowering 67.5 hours Berries 90 hours A Pamtre plant will yield ? Berries. Generation VI Pokémon X and Y Planted 0 hours Sprouted 4 hours Growing 8 hours Bigger 12 hours Budding 16 hours Bloom 20 hours Berries 24 hours A Pamtre plant will yield 3-15 Berries. During its growth, watering the plant adds 1 Berries to the final harvest, weeding it adds 1, and removing a pest adds 3. Pamtre plants attract Illumise as pests. Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire Planted 0 hours Sprouted 4 hours Taller 8 hours Flowering 12 hours Berries 16 hours A Pamtre plant will yield 3-15 Berries. Generation VII Pokémon Sun, Moon, Ultra Sun, and Ultra Moon Planted 0 hours Sprouted 6 hours Taller 12 hours Flowering 20 hours Berries 24 hours A Pamtre plant will yield 4 Berries if Isle Aplenny is at Phase 1, 8 Berries if it is at Phase 2, and 12 Berries if it is at Phase 3. Generation VIII Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl Planted 0 hours Sprouted 15 hours Taller 30 hours Flowering 45 hours Berries 60 hours A Pamtre plant will yield 2-15 Berries.
